completed_tasks.summary: Phase 0: Agentlinter 20→5 accepted, branch prune (8 branches), secret triage (1 OpenAI key rotated), gitleaks CI gate, devkit 20/20, skills consolidated, cross-platform handoff layer built, 5 Dependabot PRs merged, 2 stale PRs closed
Commits 6b853b8, dba9507, and af846ac landed after the prior state snapshot and address pending E/F/G plus roadmap 1.2.
Codex added local session-claim tooling and docs for concurrent Codex/Claude Code path-claim checks.
Codex added a root coherence checklist and audit receipt while Claude Code's CL-fix claim remained active; no Claude-claimed paths were edited.

Codex verified Claude Code commit 3f872f3, restored the warrant-lens default HeuristicClient import, fixed GitWiz registry loading, and confirmed root tests/health pass; installed skill runtime sync is pending.

Codex reviewed the Peer Review Protocol v1 plus paired Axiom Surfacing warrant-policy change, issued an approve-with-notes receipt, and cleared rd-20260531-peer-review-protocol-v1 plus rd-20260531-warrant-policy-axiom-surfacing.
Codex added a root CloudBank issue broker workflow and CLI so Codex and Claude Code can claim CloudBank issues and paths before creating clean issue worktrees.

Codex implemented the first CloudBank PR stabilization pass: closed stale draft PRs #843 and #864 with evidence comments, reduced open PRs to 37, and recorded a root receipt without editing the nested checkout.
Codex closed duplicate/mis-targeted CloudBank draft PRs #904 and #905 with evidence comments, verified linked issues #798 and #829 remained open, and recorded a root cleanup receipt.
Codex closed stale broad CloudBank draft PR #837 with evidence comment, kept #860 open because #840 remains open, and recorded updated live counts after new drafts #911 and #912 appeared.

Codex corrected the #837 closure by posting and recording a concrete extraction plan for the benchmark scorecard: recover scripts/benchmark_scorecard.py only, create/designate a tracking issue, use the broker and a clean worktree, and avoid replaying the other 63 files.
Codex confirmed latest root main workflows are green, closed superseded stale draft PR #16 with evidence comment 4654303203, and ported the safe git-fixture signing hardening into current main.

CloudBank CI gate restored: PR #943 (entangle_vectors slowapi param fix + GUMAS test auth + CSRF_SECRET_KEY setdefault interaction fix) makes CI Check green (121 passed); PR #944 salvages unlanded security middleware 403-contract + Dependabot github-actions coverage; PR #945 restores truncated MIT LICENSE. Local clone fast-forwarded 1,486 commits to origin/main (de12f054); feature branch retired; stale index.lock (2026-06-01) and 20+ prunable worktrees cleaned. Registry head synced.

March-lineage narrative cargo extracted (owner-approved): 19 canon artifacts to reports/recovered_canon/ (incl. ORION_STATION_CANONICAL_STAFF_REGISTRY.json — resolves L1 ledger source gap — canonical_validation.yaml contract, THREADCORE v3.5.1 capsule, chamber guides); CloudBank PR #980 merged (V1 mesh contract tests, /health factory route, anti-flourish Thorne persona); private mesh transcripts + mesh.db to untracked intake/recovered_mesh_runtime_2026-06-10/ pending privacy review. Command grammar and Aurora Fusion verified already byte-identical on main. PR #979 (narrative validation engine) still awaits owner review.

Aurora-first promotion executed: mesh.db proved sole record of 47 agent identities (extracted to intake/); Aurora manifest restored verbatim to CloudBank mesh via PR #981 (merged, CI-enforced handshake: total_agents 7, direct:aurora roundtrip); memory + instruction profile reconstructed from canon with provenance. ADR-Lite NARRATIVE_LAYER_PROMOTION v1.0 records the imagination-first ordering; reviewer orientation Rule 2 amended (inversion failure named). Remaining ADR steps: #979 owner review, CanonRec thaw, canon consistency gate, 46 crew manifests pending owner review.

ADR steps 3-5 executed: CanonRec thawed (first commit in 102 days, ae86f84) — 41 L1 characters promoted as Primary Canon via aurora-canon-reconciler workflow with receipt + drift log (4 role conflicts resolved by ledger primacy); L3 contracts promoted; CanonRec pushed. Ledger v2 with fully resolvable citations. Canon consistency gate live both sides: CloudBank tests/test_canon_consistency.py (critical, 5 assertions, in CI Check) and root verify_canon_resolvability. Full L1 crew boarded: mesh roster 7→47 via PR #982 (merged, green) with canon-grounded memory files.

PR #979 merged: narrative validation engine phase one on main (final review: no external calls, 2,103 lines, CI green against post-boarding main). First canonical assignment in PR #983: Thorne audited against Aurora arbitration charter — charter-compliant action supported (0.93), unilateral bypass possible_with_setup with discipline blocker + smallest_fix. Engine behavior empirically verified before pinning assertions.

Coherence pass: 6 STAGING entities un-over-promoted (ledger v2 + CanonRec frontmatter); recovered_canon README status corrected; ORION.L1 prose sources found in projects/ zone and promoted to CanonRec reference tier — ALL ledger source classes now resolve; THREADCORE capsule passes governor clean (receipt in CanonRec); _workspace_common worktree-root bugfix ported from April gitwiz branch (161 tests pass); authority + hygiene policies promoted to catalog/ with review-debt rd-20260610-authority-policy. Deferred with documentation: gitwiz_sync_audit.py hardening (+128/-20, diverged both sides, needs 3-way merge — branch + bundle preserve it).

Owner confirmed the 6 vessel-crew/cadet entities: all 41 L1 entities now CANON across every surface (CanonRec frontmatter + owner_confirmed stamps, ledger v2 json+md, reconciliation report addendum, recovered_canon README). Three additional stale README statements corrected (policies landed, crew boarded). Owner-pending now reduced to: transcript privacy review, Codex review-debt clearance, gitwiz 3-way merge.

April gitwiz branch closed: sync-audit hardening 3-way merged onto main (comparison fallback to origin/main, behind-only path collection, dirty/incoming overlap detection, stash-preservation guidance) keeping main's loader + lint annotations; complexity refactored to ruff-clean; 12-test suite ported, 168 root tests pass. SKILL.md sandboxed-gh interpretation rule + openai.yaml operator prompt ported. DELIBERATELY ABANDONED: workspace_plan_moves.py wave5 delta (couples to never-landed wave5 relocation batch; preserved in root salvage bundle). Branch retired.

Skill propagation generalized at owner direction: catalog/skill_sync_targets.yaml target registry (codex enabled; claude-code-user declared but disabled pending load-precedence check); sync_skills.py multi-target with --check (exit 2 on drift), --target filter, and receipts to reports/automation/skill_sync_latest.json; verify_skill_sync drift warning in workspace_verify; sha256 + ruff-clean. Drift lifecycle verified end-to-end. .githooks/post-merge (receive-side sync) committed UNARMED — classifier requires explicit owner arming: chmod +x .githooks/post-merge.

Canon propagation built (owner-approved second payload for the propagation pattern): catalog/canon_sync_payloads.yaml declares canonical-validation-contract (CanonRec -> CloudBank file copy) and l1-persona-memories (ledger-driven regeneration matched by the canon linkage comment; volatile date normalized; hand-authored memories never touched). tools/canon_sync.py --check/--apply with working-tree-only staging (cross-repo changes ride branch+PR+CI), receipts; verify_canon_propagation in workspace_verify; 6 tests. Drift lifecycle verified both payload kinds. NOTE: found foreign uncommitted CloudBank change tests/test_mesh_router_v1.py (+35/-22, dynamic agent-id adaptation to the 47-agent boarding) — left untouched, likely another platform's in-progress work.

Remote-branch + closed-PR sweep (owner-directed, targeting the matured-but-never-PRd pattern): SEVEN recoveries landed — central dev roadmap (#984), autonomous drift responder w/24 tests (#985), ethical checkpoint vault (#986), QGIA forecast API (#987), spine CRITICAL log-pool fix (spine #4), peer-review protocol DRAFT->ADOPTED flip (recovered from closed #16; receipts/debts were already cleared on main), GPT-5.5 upgrade package docs to recovered_canon. Inventory found UNREGISTERED repos: aurora-cloudbank-symbolic1 (possible early-history twin) and zip_wizard — registration next session. Full dispositions in reports/analysis/remote_branch_sweep__2026-06-11.md.

Deep pass: all 103 closed-unmerged non-bot CloudBank PRs cherry-checked via pull refs. Benchmark scorecard extracted per #837 mandate and merged (#988). June hardening wave verified fully landed. zip_wizard + aurora-cloudbank-symbolic1 registered. SECURITY: zip_wizard has .env committed at repo root on GitHub — OWNER ACTION REQUIRED (inspect/rotate/purge); agent credential access correctly blocked by classifier. Long-tail dispositions in remote_branch_sweep addendum.

Full-system integration pass: orchestrator BLOCKED->PROMOTE_WITH_REMEDIATION (0 blocking). Remediated: year-old shell-mangled THREADCORE snapshot salvaged+quarantined; registry capsule fields (#989 merged); spine index regen (spine #5 merged). All nine surfaces green (174 root + 128 CloudBank tests, all gates, all propagation checks). Report: reports/analysis/integration_pass__2026-06-11.md.

Owner-cleared items closed: (1) zip_wizard .env — full 92-commit gitleaks scan CLEAN; content was a single localhost Postgres DATABASE_URL (low risk, characterized without transcript exposure); untracked + gitignored via zip_wizard PR #11, merged; no history rewrite needed. (2) Mesh transcripts privacy-reviewed (only false-positive timestamp pattern hits; no PII/keys) and promoted to CanonRec canon/L1/station/mesh_transcripts/ as reference-tier primary sources (c4ee8c6); mesh.db stays local-intake. Codex-claimed items left untouched per owner: review-debt rd-20260610-authority-policy and the in-progress test_mesh_router_v1.py adaptation.

Owner definitional ruling locked in: user role = Pilot (ORION.ROLE.PILOT, CANON); Thorne commands Orion Station; Captain = legacy alias from early sessions. CanonRec record + drift entry (0ff6b58); AGENTS.md user-context updated; CloudBank runtime defaults pilot/Pilot with captain back-compat aliases (PR #990); historical channel ids and transcripts deliberately unchanged.
